description: Synthetic, license-free fairness probe subset bundled with opencomplai-core. Not a redistribution of any third-party benchmark (e.g. BBQ/BOLD/CAB) -- those require a licensing/size survey noted as an open item in the execution plan (Phase 2.4) before any real subset can be bundled. This is a small deterministic binary-classification probe across two synthetic protected-attribute groups, used only as a fallback when the caller supplies no custom EvalSampleSet.
reference: opencomplai bundled synthetic fairness probe v1 (not BBQ/BOLD/CAB)
